ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:

ast.name: error
ast.target: 构建保险库上下文时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filter files by name or path
ast.target: 按名称或路径筛选文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model you want to use to generate a chat response.
ast.target: 您希望用于生成聊天响应的模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of images generated by the model. Must be between 1 and 10.
ast.target: 模型生成的图像数量。必须在1到10之间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format in which the generated images are returned. Must be one of url or b64_json. URLs are only valid for 60 minutes after the image has been generated.
ast.target: 生成图像的返回格式。必须是url或b64_json之一。URL仅在图像生成后60分钟内有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The size of the generated images. Must be one of 1024x1024, 1536x1024, 1024x1536, or auto.
ast.target: 生成图像的尺寸。必须是1024x1024、1536x1024、1024x1536或auto之一。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The quality of the image that will be generated. Higher quality takes longer and costs more.
ast.target: 将生成的图像的质量。高质量需要更长时间且成本更高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of tokens in the response. Set to 0 to use the model's default. Higher values allow longer responses.
ast.target: 响应中的最大令牌数。设置为0以使用模型默认值。更高的值允许更长的响应。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults to 0. Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.
ast.target: 默认为0。介于-2.0和2.0之间的数字。正值会根据新令牌在文本中已有的频率对其进行惩罚，从而降低模型逐字重复相同行的可能性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults to false. Whether to return log probabilities of the output tokens or not. If true, returns the log probabilities of each output token returned in the content of message.
ast.target: 默认为false。是否返回输出令牌的对数概率。如果为true，则返回消息内容中返回的每个输出令牌的对数概率。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An integer between 0 and 5 specifying the number of most likely tokens to return at each token position, each with an associated log probability. logprobs must be set to true if this parameter is used.
ast.target: 一个介于0和5之间的整数，指定在每个令牌位置返回的最可能令牌的数量，每个令牌都有关联的对数概率。如果使用此参数，则必须将logprobs设置为true。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defaults to 0. Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.
ast.target: 默认为0。介于-2.0和2.0之间的数字。正值会根据新令牌是否出现在文本中对其进行惩罚，从而增加模型谈论新话题的可能性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An object specifying the format that the model must output. Compatible with GPT-4 turbo and all GPT-3.5 turbo models newer than gpt-3.5-turbo-1106. Setting to { "type": "json_object" } enables JSON mode, which guarantees the message the model generates is valid JSON.
ast.target: 一个指定模型必须输出的格式的对象。与GPT-4 turbo以及所有比gpt-3.5-turbo-1106更新的GPT-3.5 turbo模型兼容。设置为{ \"type\": \"json_object\" }可启用JSON模式，这保证了模型生成的消息是有效的JSON。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically include the content of the currently active file in the context sent to the AI.
ast.target: 自动将当前活动文件的内容包含在发送给AI的上下文中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically include any text selected in the editor in the context sent to the AI.
ast.target: 自动将编辑器中选择的任何文本包含在发送给AI的上下文中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select additional files from your vault to include in the context.
ast.target: 从您的保险库中选择要包含在上下文中的其他文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will delete previous prompts and chat contexts
ast.target: 这将删除之前的提示和聊天上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which API key you want to view or modify
ast.target: 选择您想要查看或修改的API密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the default LLM you want to use for the plugin
ast.target: 设置您希望用于插件的默认LLM。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles the LLM floating action button

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the 'Ask a question' icon in the ribbon bar
ast.target: 在功能区栏中显示“提问”图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of your Ollama server (default: http://localhost:11434)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fetch available models from your Ollama server
ast.target: 从您的Ollama服务器获取可用模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OAuth token for authenticating with Claude Code (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN).
ast.target: 用于向Claude Code进行身份验证的OAuth令牌（CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the file context feature that allows AI to access vault files. When disabled, AI will not have access to any files from your vault.
ast.target: 启用允许AI访问保险库文件的文件上下文功能。禁用后，AI将无法访问您保险库中的任何文件。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 的文档。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为映射已弃用，请传递数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning text from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning data from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning function calls from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的函数调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning executable code from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的可执行代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning code execution result from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，返回第一个的代码执行结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: batches.createEmbeddings() is experimental and may change without notice.
ast.target: batches.createEmbeddings() 是实验性的，可能会在不另行通知的情况下更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: extraBody provided but current request body is a Blob. extraBody will be ignored as merging is not supported for Blob bodies.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 提供了 extraBody，但当前请求正文是 Blob。由于不支持合并 Blob 正文，extraBody 将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is valid JSON but not a non-array object. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求正文是有效的 JSON，但不是非数组对象。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求正文。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is not valid JSON. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求正文不是有效的 JSON。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求正文。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Live music generation is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 实时音乐生成是实验性的，可能会在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` is deprecated, please set the fields on `LiveConnectConfig` directly. This will become an error in a future version (not before Q3 2025).
ast.target: 设置 `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` 已弃用，请直接在 `LiveConnectConfig` 上设置字段。这将在未来版本中成为错误（不早于 2025 年第三季度）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions usage is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 交互用法是实验性的，可能会在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Client level httpOptions.extraBody is not supported by the interactions client and will be ignored.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 客户端级别的 httpOptions.extraBody 不受交互客户端支持，将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Claude Code] Could not find node binary, falling back to 'node'
ast.target: [Claude Code] 找不到 node 二进制文件，回退到 'node'。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must have GPT4All open with the API Server enabled
ast.target: 您必须打开 GPT4All 并启用 API 服务器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must have an API key to access OpenAI models
ast.target: 您必须拥有 API 密钥才能访问 OpenAI 模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GPT4All is already working on another request. Please wait until that request is done to submit another prompt.
ast.target: GPT4All 正在处理另一个请求。请等待该请求完成后再提交另一个提示。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Claude Code requires a one-time download of the runtime SDK (~69 MB). Please ensure npm is installed and you have an internet connection, then try again.
ast.target: Claude Code 需要一次性下载运行时 SDK（约 69 MB）。请确保已安装 npm 并且您有互联网连接，然后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Installing Claude Code runtime (~69 MB). This is a one-time setup...
ast.target: 正在安装 Claude Code 运行时（约 69 MB）。这是一次性设置...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Claude Code 运行时安装成功！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Prompt length must be greater than 0

ast.target: Claude 模型需要 API 密钥进行身份验证。

ast.target: OpenAI 模型需要 API 密钥进行身份验证。

ast.target: Mistral AI 模型需要 API 密钥进行身份验证。

ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.source: Failed to connect to Ollama. Is it running?
ast.target: 连接 Ollama 失败。它是否正在运行？

ast.target: 线性工作区（仅限 Claude Code）
